cards.description: Learn the verified core loop: roll cards, use favorites in fights, upgrade abilities, build a lineup, and push through waves.

aboutGame.title: ¿Qué es Card Chronicles?
paragraphs: Card Chronicles is a Roblox anime card RNG and incremental simulator experience by Chronicle Entertainment. The official description focuses on rolling cards, upgrading them, unlocking abilities, and using favorite cards in combat.

The long-term loop is built around planning your lineup, fighting endless waves of card enemies, climbing ranks, and chasing rare cards. This wiki separates verified Roblox information from unconfirmed community claims.

explore.title: Explora guías de Card Chronicles
explore.description: Start with verified Roblox information, then move into focused guides for codes, card rolling, upgrades, lineups, waves, ranks, and system notes.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Códigos
modules.description: Track whether Card Chronicles has any official active Roblox redeem codes. No active official code is confirmed from the Roblox page or verified public official sources at this collection time, so this module keeps clear placeholders instead of inventing rewards.

highlights.label: None
highlights.detail: No official active redeem code confirmed

highlights.label: None
highlights.detail: Check the official Roblox page and verified official channels for future rewards

modules.name: Card Chronicles Guía
modules.description: Start with the verified Roblox loop: roll cards, use favorite cards to fight, upgrade, unlock abilities, plan your lineup, and push through waves. This guide should help new players understand what is confirmed before they chase rare cards or rank progress.

highlights.detail: Join the Roblox experience and learn the card rolling loop before spending time on advanced goals.
Use favorite cards in fights and pay attention to upgrades that unlock stronger abilities.
Plan a lineup before taking on harder waves or rank goals.
Treat rare cards, waves, and ranks as long-term progression targets.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Cartas
modules.description: Card Chronicles is centered on rolling and using anime-style cards in combat. This module covers the verified card intent while avoiding unconfirmed card lists, drop rates, or rarity tables until official data is available.

highlights.label: Roll
highlights.detail: The official Roblox description confirms rolling as a core action.

highlights.label: Fight
highlights.detail: Players use favorite cards to fight in the Card Chronicles loop.

highlights.label: Rare
highlights.detail: The official page frames rare cards as a long-term chase goal.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Best Cartas
modules.description: Players naturally search for the best cards, but no official best-card ranking is confirmed. This module should explain how to evaluate cards by upgrades, abilities, lineup role, wave performance, and rank goals without inventing a fake tier list.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Reserve this tier for cards proven by verified data or strong repeatable performance once evidence exists.

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Cards with useful abilities, lineup value, or consistent wave performance can be evaluated here after testing.

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Early cards may still matter while players are learning rolling, upgrades, and combat basics.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Lineup Guide
modules.description: The official page confirms that players plan a lineup and dominate fights. This guide should focus on practical lineup thinking: balance upgraded cards, unlocked abilities, and wave pressure instead of copying unverified builds.

highlights.detail: Start with your strongest confirmed cards and identify which ones have useful unlocked abilities.
Arrange a lineup around fight needs rather than rarity alone.
Adjust your lineup after waves reveal where your damage or survival is weak.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Upgrades
modules.description: Upgrades and ability unlocks are confirmed parts of Card Chronicles progression. This module explains upgrade priorities in a careful way, separating official mechanics from unconfirmed exact costs, multipliers, or card-specific numbers.

highlights.label: Upgrade
highlights.detail: The official description confirms players upgrade cards.

highlights.label: Ability
highlights.detail: Unlocking abilities is a verified part of progression.

highlights.label: Priority
highlights.detail: Prioritize upgrades that help current fights, waves, or lineup goals.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Waves
modules.description: Endless waves of cards and strong foes are confirmed by the Roblox page. This module covers wave progression as a core challenge, with advice focused on lineup checks, upgrades, and repeatable progress.

highlights.detail: Use waves to test whether your current lineup can handle stronger foes.
When progress slows, return to rolling, upgrades, and ability unlocks.
Track which card roles help you survive longer before changing your plan.

modules.name: Card Chronicles Ranks
modules.description: Rank climbing is listed as a goal on the official Roblox page. This module frames ranks as a long-term progression target connected to card rarity, upgrades, lineup planning, and wave performance.

highlights.label: Goal
highlights.detail: The official page says players can climb ranks and prove they are card battlers.

highlights.label: Progress
highlights.detail: Ranks should be approached after the player understands rolling, upgrades, and lineups.

highlights.label: Proof
highlights.detail: Avoid fake rank rewards or requirements unless they are verified in official sources.

faq.question: What is Card Chronicles?
faq.answer: Card Chronicles is a Roblox anime card RNG and incremental simulator game where players roll cards, upgrade them, unlock abilities, plan lineups, fight waves, and climb ranks.

faq.question: Does Card Chronicles have active codes?
faq.answer: No official active Card Chronicles redeem code is confirmed right now. This wiki keeps code status clear and avoids invented rewards.

faq.question: What should I read first in Card Chronicles?
faq.answer: Start with the beginner guide, then read cards, upgrades, lineup, waves, and ranks to understand the full progression loop.

faq.question: Is Card Chronicles Wiki official?
faq.answer: No. Card Chronicles Wiki is an independent fan-made wiki and is not affiliated with Roblox or Chronicle Entertainment.

finalCta.title: Ready to Master Card Chronicles?
finalCta.description: Use this wiki to learn the verified basics, track code status, compare card and lineup ideas, and build a clearer path from early rolls to stronger waves and ranks.
